The application reflects the cookie's value directly into the HTML without sanitization. ### Details The fsNick cookie is rendered into the DOM without encoding. While the server does reject the modified session and forces a logout, the HTML containing the payload reaches the browser first. This lets the script execute immediately upon load, effectively beating the redirect. ### PoC 1. Log in to the application with any valid account. 2. Capture any the GET request . 3. Modify the value of "fsNick" with the following JavaScript: `` 4. Send the modified request. 5. Result ### Impact The payload executes before the session ends, which could potentially allow for a single unauthorized action before the logout.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00104, "percentile": 0.01266}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gq5c-rw37-g46c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T19:34:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq5c-rw37-g46c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gq5c-rw37-g46c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-27964"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-18T22:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-05-07T19:34:28Z", "references": ["https://github.com/NeoRazorX/facturascripts/security/advisories/GHSA-gq5c-rw37-g46c", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-27964", "https://github.com/NeoRazorX/facturascripts/commit/9066e10326029adf012114e27eb5f3f33f78ecfd", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq5c-rw37-g46c"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/NeoRazorX/facturascripts/security-advisories/GHSA-gq5c-rw37-g46c", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/NeoRazorX/facturascripts", "summary": "FacturaScripts vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via Cookie Manipulation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T16:09:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq5c-rw37-g46c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "facturascripts/facturascripts"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2025.71"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: FacturaScripts vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via Cookie Manipulation
